title: Revolve Group Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
text: Revolve Group reported strong first-quarter performance with net sales reaching $342.9 million, representing 16% year-over-year growth. The company achieved net income of $13.8 million and diluted earnings per share of $0.20, up 25% from the prior year. The fashion retailer expanded its active customer base to 2.926 million, marking an 8% increase. Co-CEO Mike Karanikolas stated: Outstanding execution by our team within a dynamic operating environment led to strong first quarter results. Management emphasized several growth initiatives, including the debut of REVOLVE Los Angeles, their inaugural proprietary brand, and a partnership with Cardi B for Grow-Good Beauty products that sold out within one hour. Balance Sheet Strength: Cash and equivalents climbed to $335.8 million from $303.2 million at year-end 2025. The company maintained its debt-free status while generating $49.4 million in operating cash flow during the quarter. For full-year 2026, Revolve projects gross margins between 53.5% and 54.0%, with general and administrative expenses estimated at $164-168 million. The company plans to open a Miami retail location by year-end.
